map.ariaLabel: Map of your route and nearby cameras

result.fullyClean: This route avoids all known cameras.
result.alreadyClean: No cameras on your route — no detours needed.
result.notCameraFree: Heads up: no fully camera-free route exists. This route still passes within view of some cameras — the fewest possible. Drive with that in mind.

handoff.warning: Opening an external map shares this route's locations with that provider. Continue?

errors.no_route: We couldn't find a drivable route. Try different locations.
errors.bad_request: Please enter both a start and a destination.
errors.outside_coverage: Camera data isn't available for this area yet, so we routed normally.
errors.stale_data: Camera data for this area may be out of date; avoidance could be incomplete.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.locationDenied: Location access was denied. Enter your start address instead.
errors.locationUnavailable: Your location is unavailable right now. Enter your start address instead.
errors.locationTimeout: Getting your location timed out. Try again or enter your start address.
errors.locationUnsupported: This browser can't share your location. Enter your start address instead.
